creator: rb@nugman.de
text:
Created attachment 186378
Changes in port dir in order to update to CrashPlanPRO 4.9.0

I took a look at the port and was able to upgrade to 4.9.0 using the attached files (replacing the Makefile, distinfo and pkg-plist in ports dir).
I hope it helps other people or the port maintainer to update the port accordingly.
